field.label: Listen port
field.help: TCP port for JSON-lines NC-Link PDUs.

field.label: Device UUID
field.help: Default dev_uuid used by the bundled CNC model.

field.label: Model version
field.help: Version reported by Probe/Version and model probe responses.

field.label: Model JSON
field.help: Optional NC-Link machine model JSON. Leave empty to use the built-in standard-style sample model.
